hero.title: Turning satisfaction scores into decisions that move capital.
hero.content: We design customer satisfaction programmes for banks, insurance companies and wealth managers that link experiences at every touchpoint to KPIs, ROI and long-term loyalty.

card.title: Customer satisfaction as an early-warning system.
card.content: We connect survey feedback with your operational data: complaints, churn, product usage, NPS and employee metrics. The result is a reporting layer that translates experiences into concrete actions for branches, contact centres and digital teams.

intro.title: Financial decisions are based on trust, not just price.
intro.content: We design satisfaction programmes that combine representative measurements with pragmatic KPIs, so your teams see what really moves the needle over time.

retail.label: Retail banking
retail.text: In retail banking, satisfaction programmes focus on everyday interactions: accounts, cards, online access and simple advisory meetings. We link these experiences to churn, product holding and recommendation.

insurance.label: Insurance
insurance.text: In insurance, claims handling and communication during incidents are central. Satisfaction tracking helps you understand how well your processes work when customers actually need you.

wealth.label: Wealth management
wealth.text: For wealth and asset management, trust and continuity are key. Satisfaction measurements show how advice quality, transparency and digital reporting affect long-term relationships.

pillars.title: Retention & lifetime value
pillars.text: Identify which customer groups are at risk, and which experiences drive long-term loyalty and product depth.

pillars.title: Risk & reputation
pillars.text: Use satisfaction scores as an early indicator for reputational risk, regulatory issues and service breakdowns.

pillars.title: Commercial steering
pillars.text: Translate feedback into concrete targets for regions, branches and channels instead of generic slogans.

channels.title: A consistent view across all customer journeys.
channels.content: We map your main journeys and then align measurements and KPIs. Select a touchpoint to see how we typically structure indicators and feedback.

branches.title: Branches & advisors
branches.desc: Complex products and advice situations are still handled face-to-face.

contact.title: Contact centres
contact.desc: When something goes wrong, the call centre becomes the main touchpoint.

digital.title: Online banking & apps
digital.desc: Everyday usage happens in digital channels – especially for younger segments.

claims.title: Claims & incidents
claims.desc: For insurance and payments, claims handling defines long-term loyalty.

programs.title: From one-off surveys to continuous decision support.
programs.content: Combine long-term tracking with focused deep dives and closed-loop feedback. You decide which elements you need – we make sure they fit together technically and methodologically.

survey.title: Continuous tracking
survey.desc: Stable, long-term tracking of satisfaction, loyalty and NPS.
bullets: Consistent questionnaires and weighting over time
Regular management updates and automated exports
Benchmarks for regions, channels and products

adhoc.title: Ad-hoc deep dives
adhoc.desc: Focused modules around specific questions or events.
bullets: Launch of new products or pricing models

closedloop.title: Closed-loop feedback
closedloop.desc: Individual cases trigger workflows and follow-ups.
bullets: Routing of feedback to branches or service teams
Tracking of resolution and learning loops

insights.title: Reporting that supports decisions, not just slides.
insights.content: We design reporting environments where satisfaction scores live alongside your financial KPIs. The result: management views for steering, and operational views for teams.

foundations.title: Data foundations
foundations.desc: Clean survey data, harmonised time series and robust weighting so trends are real and comparable between segments.
foundations.extra: We define which KPIs are central, which are supporting, and how they are documented across studies.

dashboards.title: Dashboards & alerts
dashboards.desc: Role-based dashboards for management, branches and call centres, plus alerts when critical indicators drop.
dashboards.extra: Standard figures are scheduled, while flexible filters allow exploration of sub-groups on demand.

story.title: Storytelling & action
story.desc: Management summaries, workshops and playbooks that translate findings into concrete actions for teams.
story.extra: We write and visualise results so that your teams can work with them without needing a statistician at their side.
